aeo_readiness.summary: The website has minimal content and lacks essential elements for AEO readiness, such as structured data and informative content.
quick_wins: Add relevant and informative content about heating and cooling services.
Implement schema markup to provide search engines with structured data.
Encourage customer reviews to build credibility and improve local SEO.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for Duke's Heating and Cooling. This is a critical issue for local search visibility.
critical_issues: No GBP exists for the business.
Lack of local search presence and customer engagement.

nap_citations.summary: There is no evidence of consistent Name, Address, and Phone Number (NAP) citations across the web. This inconsistency can harm local search rankings.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Monitor and update NAP citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and informative content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for heating and cooling services in Littleton, Colorado.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement schema markup and create a Google Business Profile.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Build content around common HVAC issues and solutions to establish expertise and improve search rankings.
